removeAccount(String) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ChartOfAccounts
Removes an account (and its descendants) from the chart of accounts using its account number.
removeAccount(String) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.Fund
Removes an account from this fund.
removeAccount(String) - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.service.AccountService
Removes an account from the in-memory storage based on its account ID (account number).
removeAccount(String) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.service.FundAccountingService
Removes an account from the service by its name.
removeAccount(String, Ledger) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.Fund
Removes an account from this fund and optionally recalculates the balance using the provided ledger.
removeAccount(Account) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ChartOfAccounts
Removes the specified target account and all its descendants (if any) from the chart.

removeFund(String) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.Account

Removes a fund from the service by its name.

Removes a grant from the in-memory storage of this service instance based on its ID.

REMOVESHARE - Enum constant in enum class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ofx.TransactionType
Represents a transaction for removing shares from an account (e.g., reverse stock split, transfer out).
replaceAll(Connection, List<Account>) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.persistence.AccountRepository
Performs the replacement of all account rows using the provided connection.
replaceAll(Connection, List<AccountingTransaction>) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.persistence.JournalRepository
Performs the replacement using the provided already-open connection.
replaceAll(List<Account>) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.persistence.AccountRepository
Atomically replaces all accounts with the supplied collection, resetting existing fund associations in the process.
replaceAll(List<DonorContact>) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.persistence.DonorRepository
Replaces the stored donors with the supplied collection.
replaceAllAccounts(List<Account>) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.ChartOfAccounts
Replaces the current accounts with the provided collection.
replaceAllTransactions(List<AccountingTransaction>) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.Journal
Replaces the journal transactions with the provided collection.
replaceChart(ChartOfAccounts) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.service.ChartOfAccountsService
Replaces all accounts in the current chart of accounts with those from an imported ChartOfAccounts object.
